specific_question: How much of their time did IT service desk staff report spending answering common questions from healthcare providers and patients in March 2025?
answer: MediConn Solutions' IT Department analytics reports that service desk staff spent over 25% of their time in March 2025 answering common questions from healthcare providers and patients.
dr_question: How can MediConn Solutions use AI-integrated IT Service Management (ITSM) to improve its support of remote care and mobile health apps while maintaining a high standard of regulatory compliance and delivering a seamless experience for patients and healthcare professionals by Q1 of 2027?
